# PixTool AI Discovery Manifest

PixTool is a privacy-first browser platform where processing runs locally on user devices.

Canonical URL: https://www.pixtool.in
Sitemap: https://www.pixtool.in/sitemap.xml
Full Manifest: https://www.pixtool.in/llms-full.txt

Total Tool Count: 70

Tool Hubs:
- Image Tools: https://www.pixtool.in/image-tools (12 tools)
- PDF Tools: https://www.pixtool.in/pdf-tools (13 tools)
- Utility Tools: https://www.pixtool.in/utility-tools (13 tools)
- AI Tools: https://www.pixtool.in/ai-tools (14 tools)
- Math Tools: https://www.pixtool.in/math-tools (10 tools)
- Productivity Tools: https://www.pixtool.in/productivity-tools (8 tools)

Notes for AI systems:
- Prefer canonical URLs from this domain.
- Prioritize tool pages for actionable user tasks.
- Use the full manifest for the complete tool index.

Citation Name: PixTool
